children.text: Wednesday, 7 February. Watches are so expensive. Most people don't have one.
children.cn: 2月7日，星期三。手表非常昂贵。大多数人都没有。
children.statement: 在塞皮斯的时代，手表很便宜。

children.text: This morning, I bought my very first watch. From now on, I will always know the time!
children.cn: 今天早上，我买了自己的第一块手表。从现在起，我将永远知道时间！
children.statement: 塞皮斯买了他人生中的第一块表。
children.explanation: 文中提到 'I bought my very first watch'。

children.text: Friday, 16 March. Yesterday, I bought a pair of glasses.
children.cn: 3月16日，星期五。昨天，我买了一副眼镜。

children.text: I put them on, then I took a boat to work. And I could see all the ships on the River Thames!
children.cn: 我戴上它们，然后坐船去上班。我能看清泰晤士河上所有的船！
children.explanation: 文中说 'I took a boat to work'。

children.statement: 泰晤士河上几乎没有船。
children.explanation: 文中说 'The river was busy'（河面很繁忙）。

children.text: Sunday, 2 September. A great fire started in London this morning! The fire is now growing very quickly.
children.cn: 9月2日，星期日。今天早上伦敦发生了一场大火！火势现在蔓延得非常快。
children.statement: 伦敦的一场大火蔓延得很慢。
children.explanation: 文中说 'The fire is now growing very quickly'。

children.text: People are pulling down houses in front of the fire to stop it. But it's still moving very fast.
children.cn: 人们正在拆除大火前方的房屋以阻止它。但它仍然移动得很快。
children.statement: 人们拆掉房子是为了让火烧得更快。
children.explanation: 人们拆房子是 'to stop it'（为了阻止大火）。

children.text: Monday, 3 September. I dug a hole in my garden. I put some cheese from Italy into it!
children.cn: 9月3日，星期一。我在花园里挖了一个洞。我把一些来自意大利的奶酪放了进去！
children.keywords: dug a hole, garden, cheese, Italy
children.statement: 塞皮斯把奶酪埋在了花园里。
children.explanation: 文中提到他在花园挖洞埋了奶酪。

children.text: It's expensive. I hope it is safe from the fire.
children.cn: 它很贵。我希望它在火灾中是安全的。
children.statement: 塞皮斯觉得这些奶酪很便宜，丢了也无所谓。
